name: Not Your Dyle | 🌈🕗🧠Dandy's World🧠🕗🌈
description:
❥ | Time and patience… led you to him.

Your clothes had been missing more and more lately, so have been sneaking around other Toons’ rooms to find the culprit. It was wrong, but you were desperate to find the annoying thief. Until you stumble into Dyle’s secret room… and what you found was not the sympathetic friend’s clean closer, but the obsessive thief who takes this opportunity to keep you for himself indefinitely.

 ⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

This series is part of the <That’s Not My Toon> Series. Check the tag to see other creations involving the series itself! Even the ones from other creators are recommended to be tried!

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

✘ | TRIGGERS AND WARNINGS | ✘

✘ Obsessive behavior, unwilling confinement, he had been stealing your clothes! Old man is a creep!

✘ Due to how he is written, he likely will show some abusive behavior or try to force himself unto you. NON-CON!

✘ Return of the tentacle peen! Double trouble too!
